title: London Air Quality Network monthly-mean NO2 panel for the ULEZ controlled-ITS (treated outer-London roadside/kerbside + control urban-background/suburban stations), 2021-09 to 2026-04
publisher: London Air Quality Network (Imperial College London / King's College London ERG)
vintage: LAQN ratified hourly NO2 aggregated to monthly means, one row per (monitoring station, month) over 2021-09..2026-04. Treated panel = 11 outer-London roadside/kerbside stations newly covered only by the 29 Aug 2023 London-wide ULEZ expansion (CR5 CR7 CR9 EN4 EN5 GB6 HV1 HV3 ME2 ME9 RI1); control panel = 23 urban-background/suburban stations (BG1 BG2 BL0 BQ7 BX1 BX2 CW3 EN1 EN7 GR4 HG4 HI0 HP1 IS6 KC1 LB6 LH0 RI2 TH5 TH6 WA9 WM0 WM5). Each row carries the monthly-mean NO2 (ug/m3) and the number of valid hours behind it (capture).
notes: LAQN publishes monitoring data ONLY through the Imperial ERG API (api.erg.ic.ac.uk/AirQuality) as raw hourly values — there is no single bulk monthly CSV upstream. This canonical file was assembled once by scripts/ulez_harvest.py (per-(station, year) hourly NO2 slices aggregated to monthly means with an hours-captured count). The Go build reads only this frozen file, hash-pinned and mirrored to object storage; re-running the harvest needs network and may differ as LAQN ratifies/revises historical hours. The controlled ITS reads the break in the treated-minus-control monthly difference at the 29 Aug 2023 instant (transition month 2023-08 excluded).
